name: typeless-surge-wss-sign
description: Generic Surge script for rewriting Typeless WSS auth t parameter with local Date.now signing.

scripts.build: esbuild src/typeless_wss_sign.mjs --bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --target=es2018 --outfile=dist/typeless_wss_sign.js --banner:js="// Typeless Surge WSS fresh signer. Generic script; pass private values via Surge module argument."
